displayName: Lead Alloy (BMP-3 armor insert, radiation shielding)
notes: Lead alloy (Pb-Sb 1-6% antimony). Density 11.34 g/cm³ — high density with minimal structural strength. BHN ~4-6 (pure lead 5), UTS ~10-20 MPa. RHAe ~0.03-0.05 per mm vs KE — negligible ballistic resistance per thickness. Used in some armor composites (BMP-3) as high-density filler and for x-ray/radiation shielding. Very ductile — deforms rather than fragments on impact. Not a structural armor material.
